info.title: Rockbox HTTP API
info.summary: HTTP REST API for rockboxd — playback, library, playlists, devices, settings.
info.description:
Rockbox Daemon exposes its full feature surface over HTTP REST on port 6063 (configurable via `ROCKBOX_TCP_PORT`). It complements the GraphQL API on :6062 and the gRPC API on :6061 — all three speak to the same in-process state.

All handlers are defined in `crates/server/src/handlers/` and registered in `crates/server/src/lib.rs:run_http_server()`.

put.summary: Persist metadata for an HTTP stream URL
put.description: Used by the player when a remote URL is loaded — saves title/artist/album/duration so the URL can be resolved from the DB later.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Path to list (absolute). Defaults to $ROCKBOX_LIBRARY or $HOME/Music.

example.name: /Users/tsirysandratraina/Music/Union Of Sound - Acoustic - A Quiet Night In (Explicit)

500.description: Path is not a directory or other I/O error

put.summary: Load tracks into an external player (Cast/AirPlay)

404.description: No external player connected or no playable tracks

put.summary: Start playback at an offset
Pause playback
Resume playback
Seek to an absolute position (ms)

200.description: Currently playing Mp3Entry, or null if nothing is playing
Next Mp3Entry, or null if at end of queue

put.summary: Flush PCM buffers and reload the current queue
Skip to the next track
Skip to the previous track
Hard-stop playback

get.summary: Get the current byte offset in the playing file
Get current volume range and value

put.summary: Adjust volume by N firmware-defined steps

post.summary: Replace the live queue with a new playlist

200.description: Start index of the new playlist (as plain text)

put.summary: Start playback at a queue index
Shuffle the live queue

get.summary: Number of tracks in the live queue

put.summary: Resume the saved control file playlist
Resume the saved track at its previous offset

get.summary: List tracks currently in the queue

example.path: /Users/tsirysandratraina/Music/Cannons - All I Need/1. Cannons - All I Need.m4a
example.title: All I Need

post.summary: Insert tracks into the live queue

delete.summary: Remove tracks from the live queue

get.summary: Get the live queue and its metadata

entries.path: /Users/tsirysandratraina/Music/Cannons - All I Need/1. Cannons - All I Need.m4a
entries.title: All I Need

get.summary: List saved playlists, optionally filtered by folder

put.summary: Update a saved playlist's metadata

get.summary: List tracks in a saved playlist

example.path: /Users/tsirysandratraina/Music/J. Cole - 2014 Forest Hills Drive (Explicit)/06. J. Cole - Fire Squad (Explicit).m4a
example.title: Fire Squad

post.summary: Add tracks to a saved playlist

get.summary: List track ids in a saved playlist

delete.summary: Remove a track from a saved playlist

post.summary: Load a saved playlist into the queue and start playing
Create a smart playlist with a rule criteria

put.summary: Update a smart playlist

get.summary: Resolve a smart playlist to its current matching tracks

post.summary: Resolve a smart playlist and start playing its tracks

get.summary: Get listening stats for a track

post.summary: Record a 'played' event for a track
Record a 'skipped' event for a track

get.summary: List all known output devices (discovered + virtual)
Get a device by id (use 'current' for the active sink)

put.summary: Switch the active sink to this device
Disconnect the active device and revert to builtin
Apply a partial settings update and persist to settings.toml
Trigger a library scan and (optionally) rebuild the search index
Connect to a paired Bluetooth device (Linux only)
Disconnect a Bluetooth device (Linux only)

Mp3Entry.description: Rockbox firmware-side representation of a playing or queued track

service.description: builtin | fifo | airplay | squeezelite | upnp | chromecast | snapcast

directory.description: Insert all audio files under this directory instead of an explicit list

positions.description: Empty array clears the entire queue

RuleCriteria.description: Smart-playlist rule set. See `crates/playlists/src/rules.rs` for the canonical definition.

field.description: play_count | skip_count | last_played | year | duration_ms | genre | artist | …

op.description: eq | ne | gt | gte | lt | lte | contains | within | not_within

NewGlobalSettings.description: Partial settings update — only the fields you set are written.
